case_title: SALLIE J MCKENNA VS. MARK M NORRELL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-02-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NORRELL, MARK M (WEST PORTAL OPTICAL)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCKENNA, SALLIE J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORRELL, MARK M (WEST PORTAL OPTICAL) $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, (NO COSTS AWARDED) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF MCKENNA, SALLIE J ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NORRELL, MARK M (WEST PORTAL OPTICAL)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY MCKENNA, SALLIE J AS TO DEFENDANT NORRELL, MARK M (WEST PORTAL OPTICAL) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2015 BY QUEENA HO. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE: QUEENA HO. FILED BY MCKENNA, SALLIE J NORRELL, MARK M (WEST PORTAL OPTICAL)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2015 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
